response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Mismatch: The reference JSON incorrectly identified the first song as 'Baka Majime' from 00:00, when it was actually 'Nobishiro'. 2. JSON Usage: The lyrics from the reference JSON were discarded for the first song and manually transcribed. For 'Baka Majime' (starting at 01:54), the reference lyrics were verified against the audio, aligned, and translated. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed specifically to the vocal boundaries, utilizing instantaneous transitions for fast-paced sequences to avoid cascading delays, and adding visual subtitles for the 'Longiness' song title card at the end during instrumental silence.

subtitles.original: カッコのつけ方 調子のこき方 腹の据え方 いい歳のこき方
subtitles.english: How to look cool, act cocky, stay gutsy, and act our age

subtitles.original: 脂のりに乗った 濁った目をした だらしない身体
subtitles.english: An in-their-prime, cloudy-eyed, out-of-shape body

subtitles.original: 幸せの体感速度は 早くなるばかり
subtitles.english: The perceived speed of happiness only gets faster

subtitles.original: 傷が癒えていく速度は 遅くなるばかり
subtitles.english: The speed at which wounds heal only gets slower

subtitles.original: 他人に期待をしないのが今の俺の強み
subtitles.english: Not expecting anything from others is my strength now

subtitles.original: 手負いでも進める距離なら 行く 騙し騙し
subtitles.english: If it's a distance I can cover even when wounded, I'll go, keeping it together somehow

subtitles.original: 身の程を知るほどに
subtitles.english: The more I learn my place,

subtitles.original: 胸を張り いつも通り
subtitles.english: I puff out my chest and act as usual

subtitles.original: でも時にしたって良い背伸び
subtitles.english: But sometimes, it's okay to stretch myself

subtitles.original: やっと「大人気ない」が出来る歳
subtitles.english: I'm finally at an age where I can act immature

subtitles.original: 小さな枠組み
subtitles.english: A small framework,

subtitles.original: ただの数字
subtitles.english: just a number

subtitles.original: 縛られずに
subtitles.english: Unbound by them,

subtitles.original: でも腹くくり
subtitles.english: yet steeling my resolve

subtitles.original: あの日の俺が立ち止まる
subtitles.english: The 'me' from back then would stand frozen

subtitles.original: ほどにデカくそびえ立つ
subtitles.english: before what towers so hugely over me

subtitles.original: 隅田川にかかる
subtitles.english: Crossing over the Sumida River,

subtitles.original: 勝鬨橋を渡る
subtitles.english: I walk across Kachidoki Bridge

subtitles.original: 重なるスカイツリー
subtitles.english: The overlapping Tokyo Skytree,

subtitles.original: 東京タワーと真ん中の 頼りない背中
subtitles.english: Tokyo Tower, and in the middle, an unreliable back

subtitles.original: サボり方とか 甘え方とか 逃げ方とか 言い訳の仕方とか
subtitles.english: How to slack off, how to play coddled, how to run away, how to make excuses...

subtitles.original: やっと覚えてきた 身につけてきた 柔らかい頭
subtitles.english: I've finally started to learn and acquire a flexible mind

subtitles.original: カッコのつけ方 調子のこき方 腹の据え方 いい歳のこき方
subtitles.english: How to look cool, act cocky, stay gutsy, and act our age

subtitles.original: 脂のりに乗った 濁った目をした だらしない身体
subtitles.english: An in-their-prime, cloudy-eyed, out-of-shape body

subtitles.original: 嫌われ方や 慕われ方や 叱り方とか 綺麗なぶつかり方
subtitles.english: How to be disliked, how to be adored, how to scold, and how to clash beautifully

subtitles.original: 覚えたいことが山のようにある
subtitles.english: There are tons of things I want to learn

subtitles.original: のびしろしかないわ
subtitles.english: There's nothing but room to grow

subtitles.original: のびしろしかないわ
subtitles.english: There's nothing but room to grow

subtitles.original: のびしろしかないわ
subtitles.english: There's nothing but room to grow

subtitles.original: のびしろしかないわ
subtitles.english: There's nothing but room to grow

subtitles.original: のびしろしかないわ
subtitles.english: There's nothing but room to grow

subtitles.original: のびしろしかないわ
subtitles.english: There's nothing but room to grow

subtitles.original: 俺らまだのびしろしかないわ
subtitles.english: We still have nothing but room to grow!

subtitles.original: くだんない話と
subtitles.english: Silly talk and...

subtitles.original: うざったい貴様と
subtitles.english: annoying you...

subtitles.original: なみなみの 日々に 注がれてく
subtitles.english: Everything dumped monotonously into my days

subtitles.original: 怠いが溢れ出してく
subtitles.english: Weariness overflows

subtitles.original: 飯がまだ届かない
subtitles.english: The food hasn't arrived yet

subtitles.original: 仕事は片付かない
subtitles.english: My work is not done

subtitles.original: うだつの上がらない 毎日にため息ばかり
subtitles.english: Nothing but sighs for these unproductive days

subtitles.original: でまたド派手にすっころび
subtitles.english: And then I take another spectacular fall

subtitles.original: 洗い立てのシャツにこぼすコーヒー
subtitles.english: Spilling coffee on a freshly washed shirt

subtitles.original: 前のめりその姿勢だけは褒めて良し
subtitles.english: Leaning forward, at least that posture is worth praising

subtitles.original: 肩落とす並木通り 増えた柄と差し色に
subtitles.english: Walking down the tree-lined street with slumped shoulders, amidst the increasing patterns and accent colors

subtitles.original: 嗚呼 本当嫌んなる毎日だ
subtitles.english: Ah, it's really a depressing daily life

subtitles.original: やりたくないことやったって
subtitles.english: Even if I do things I don't want to do,

subtitles.original: 嫌々早起きしたって
subtitles.english: even if I drag myself out of bed early,

subtitles.original: その分素敵な何かが
subtitles.english: it's not like something wonderful

subtitles.original: 訪れるとかそんなわけでもないのにさ
subtitles.english: is going to come my way because of it.

subtitles.original: 今日もまた頑張っちゃうよな
subtitles.english: Yet today, I'm going to work hard again.

subtitles.original: がむしゃら以外知らないから
subtitles.english: Because I don't know any other way than going all out.

subtitles.original: 不器用で意地っ張りで
subtitles.english: Clumsy and stubborn,

subtitles.original: 馬鹿真面目な僕らに幸あれ
subtitles.english: may good fortune find us stupidly honest souls.

subtitles.original: 重くなってきた荷物をちょっと置いて立ち止まり
subtitles.english: Putting down the heavy luggage for a bit and stopping

subtitles.original: 昨日の事なんざ忘れちまえば同じ
subtitles.english: If you just forget about yesterday, it's all the same

subtitles.original: 浴びるdaylight羽根伸ばし
subtitles.english: Bathing in the daylight, spreading our wings

subtitles.original: それか月夜にこっそりと吐き出してしまえば良い
subtitles.english: Or quietly letting it all out under the moonlight is fine

subtitles.original: でもその前にアレとコレの話
subtitles.english: But before that, let's talk about this and that

subtitles.original: その為には先ずはソレを片し
subtitles.english: For that, first, let's clean up that thing

subtitles.original: って今は何時？ いやその前に
subtitles.english: Wait, what time is it now? No, before that,

subtitles.original: 今日もなんだかんだ騒がしい毎度あり
subtitles.english: today is somehow noisy as always, thanks for coming!

subtitles.original: 1ヶ月くらい何にも考えずだらだらしていたいな
subtitles.english: I want to spend about a month slacking off without thinking about anything

subtitles.original: ゆっくり休んで遊んで眠っていたいな
subtitles.english: I want to rest slowly, play, and sleep

subtitles.original: って思う日もあるけれど
subtitles.english: There are days when I think like that, but...

subtitles.original: やっとここまできたんだよ
subtitles.english: we've finally made it this far!

subtitles.original: ここじゃ終われないんだよ
subtitles.english: We can't let it end here!

subtitles.original: 辛いきついもいつかは
subtitles.english: Even the painful and hard times will one day

subtitles.original: 笑い話にできると信じてるんだほら
subtitles.english: be something we can laugh about, I believe in that!

subtitles.original: 今日もまた頑張っちゃうからさ
subtitles.english: Because today, I'm going to work hard again

subtitles.original: がむしゃらに愛を歌うからさ
subtitles.english: Because I'm going to sing of love with all my might

subtitles.original: 目一杯吸い込んだ空気
subtitles.english: Inhaling air to my heart's content...

subtitles.original: 嗚呼 本当素晴らしい毎日だ
subtitles.english: Ah, it's really a wonderful daily life!

subtitles.original: やりたくないことやったって
subtitles.english: Even if I do things I don't want to do,

subtitles.original: 嫌々早起きしたって
subtitles.english: even if I drag myself out of bed early,

subtitles.original: ほんほんの少しの幸せに
subtitles.english: just touching a tiny bit

subtitles.original: 触れるだけで全部全部ありに思えるんだ
subtitles.english: of happiness makes it feel like it was all worth it!

subtitles.original: 明日もまた頑張ってみようか
subtitles.english: Shall we try working hard again tomorrow?

subtitles.original: がむしゃらに生きていくんだ
subtitles.english: We're going to live with all our might!

subtitles.original: 不器用で意地っ張りで
subtitles.english: Clumsy and stubborn,

subtitles.original: 馬鹿真面目な僕らに幸あれ
subtitles.english: may good fortune find us stupidly honest souls!

subtitles.original: do my thing, do your thing
subtitles.english: Do my thing, do your thing

subtitles.original: 肩の力を抜いて柔軟に
subtitles.english: Relax your shoulders and be flexible

subtitles.original: do my thing, do your thing
subtitles.english: Do my thing, do your thing

subtitles.original: あと1ミリ背伸び
subtitles.english: Stretching ourselves just one more millimeter

subtitles.original: ああ、本当嫌んなっちゃうよな
subtitles.english: Ah, it really makes me sick

subtitles.original: それでも今を生きている
subtitles.english: But still, we live in the present

subtitles.original: 不器用で意地っ張りで
subtitles.english: Clumsy and stubborn,

subtitles.original: 馬鹿真面目なあなたに幸あれ
subtitles.english: may good fortune find you stupidly honest souls!

subtitles.original: Longiness
subtitles.english: [Song: Longiness]
